title: American Football Kicks - Safe Kid Games
meta_description: Step up for the win in American Football Kicks! Line up your shot, aim perfectly, and score goals to earn the highest score in this exciting sports challenge!

author: safekidgames

section_blocks.heading: Game Description
section_blocks.text: Game Description Let’s play football! In this challenging sports game, it’s penalty kick time and the pressure’s on for the perfect kick. Line up the football just right and score the GOAL!

section_blocks.heading: Game Instructions
section_blocks.text: Game Instructions Tap or click START to play. The object of the game is to kick the football perfectly into the goal. There are two slides, one at the top and one on the side. On your keyboard, press the spacebar or use your mouse to choose the point where you’d like to kick on BOTH slides. The closer to the green markers you are, the better chance at kicking the perfect goal and earning the highest score. Good luck!
